com.mentor.chs.plugin.changemanager

Interface IXAutoLink

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXPlugin
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXHarnessXCAutoLink, IXIntegratorAutoLink, IXTopologyAutoLink

    public interface IXAutoLink
extends IXPlugin
    This interface is extended by IXIntegratorAutoLink and IXHarnessXCAutoLink Implement IXIntegratorAutoLink if customized auto link functionality is required in the Integrator Change Manager. Implement IXHarnessXCAutoLink if customized auto link functionality is required in the Harness XC Change Manager.
    See Also:
    IXIntegratorAutoLink,

    WARNING: When implementing plugins NEVER NEVER EVER exit the application. 

                                 System.exit(); // This is BAD
    This will cause the application to exit in a very untidy way and will result in the loss of any unsaved data. DO NOT DO THIS.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXObject getLinkableDesignObject(java.lang.Object x2mlElem, IXHarness harness)
      Given an x2ml object instance and a Capital design Harness, return the corresponding IXObject to which the x2ml object is to be linked.
      java.lang.Object getLinkableExternalObject(IXObject designObject, java.lang.Object harness)
      Given a Capital design object instance and an x2ml Harness, return the corresponding x2ml object to which the design object is to be linked.
      boolean isAutoLinkableByPlugin(java.lang.Object object)
      Given a Capital design object or an x2ml object, return whether the plugin can handle the object.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • getLinkableDesignObject

        IXObject getLinkableDesignObject(java.lang.Object x2mlElem,
                                 IXHarness harness)
        Given an x2ml object instance and a Capital design Harness, return the corresponding IXObject to which the x2ml object is to be linked. Applicable only when the change manager filter set to show the External objects

        It is the responsibility of the plugin to return an IXObject instance which has an empty or null MCadID attribute value. If it already has a non null and non empty MCadID, then it will not be linked to the given x2ml object.

        Parameters:
        x2mlElem - Object
        harness - IXHarness
        Returns:
        the IXObject instance

      • getLinkableExternalObject

        java.lang.Object getLinkableExternalObject(IXObject designObject,
                                           java.lang.Object harness)
        Given a Capital design object instance and an x2ml Harness, return the corresponding x2ml object to which the design object is to be linked. Applicable only when the change manager filter set to show the Capital objects
        Parameters:
        designObject - IXObject
        harness - x2ml Harness
        Returns:
        the x2ml object instance

      • isAutoLinkableByPlugin

        boolean isAutoLinkableByPlugin(java.lang.Object object)
        Given a Capital design object or an x2ml object, return whether the plugin can handle the object.
        Parameters:
        object - IXObject or an x2ml object
        Returns:
        whether the object can be handled by the plugin
